post:

Watch the second-order impact, not just the headline.

thread:
This news can affect Indian investors:

Iran-US deal impact on India: Oil, rupee, inflation, Russian crude and Chabahar expla...

viralReplies:
Everyone is watching the headline.
The real money is in the second-order impact.

Bad news does not always mean bad markets.
Markets price surprise, not emotions.

The missing angle: inflation reacts before retail investors do.
That is where the trade starts.
